templates.name: Fixed — acknowledge
templates.body: Fixed in `{{sha}}` — thanks for catching this, @{{author}}.

templates.name: Out of scope (follow-up)
templates.body: Good point — this is a bit out of scope for this PR. I've opened a follow-up to track it so we can keep this change focused.

templates.name: Will do in a follow-up
templates.body: Agreed. I'll handle this in a follow-up PR rather than expand the diff here.

templates.name: Ask for clarification
templates.body: Could you clarify what you'd like here? I want to make sure I address `{{path}}` the way you intended before changing it.
